# INamedTheme.ActiveCustomName property

Name of the active custom theme, or null when a built-in preset is active. When non-null, [`Active`](./Active.md) reports the custom theme's base preset (so existing preset-based readers keep working).

```csharp
public string? ActiveCustomName { get; }
```
